name: ramp
description: Read Ramp corporate card transactions, cards, employees, and reimbursements for spend management

envVars.name: RAMP_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Ramp developer app Client ID (Ramp dashboard → Company → Developer)

tools.name: List Transactions
tools.description: List card transactions with optional filtering by state, user, card, or date window

state.description: Filter by transaction state: ALL, CLEARED, COMPLETION, DECLINED, ERROR, PENDING, or PENDING_INITIATION (default excludes declined transactions)

user_id.description: Only return transactions made by this user

card_id.description: Only return transactions on this card

merchant_id.description: Only return transactions with this merchant

from_date.description: Only transactions with a user_transaction_time after this ISO 8601 date

to_date.description: Only transactions with a user_transaction_time before this ISO 8601 date

start.description: Pagination cursor: ID of the last entity of the previous page

historicalSummary.omitted: accounting field selections, receipts, disputes, and policy violation details

tools.name: Get Transaction
tools.description: Fetch full details of a single card transaction

include_merchant_data.description: Include all purchase data provided by the merchant

tools.name: List Cards
tools.description: List corporate cards with optional filtering by owner or activation state

user_id.description: Only return cards owned by this user

is_activated.description: Filter only for activated cards (defaults to true if not specified)

is_terminated.description: Filter only for terminated cards (defaults to false if not specified)

start.description: Pagination cursor: ID of the last entity of the previous page

historicalSummary.omitted: spending restrictions, fulfillment details, and card program metadata

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List employees on the Ramp account with optional filtering by email, role, department, or status

role.description: Filter by user role, e.g. BUSINESS_ADMIN, BUSINESS_USER, BUSINESS_OWNER, BUSINESS_BOOKKEEPER

status.description: Filter by user status: USER_ACTIVE, USER_DRAFT, USER_INACTIVE, or USER_SUSPENDED

start.description: Pagination cursor: ID of the last entity of the previous page

historicalSummary.omitted: custom fields, manager assignments, and scheduled deactivation details

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Fetch a single employee by ID, e.g. to resolve the user_id referenced on a transaction or card

tools.name: Get Card
tools.description: Fetch a single corporate card by ID, e.g. to resolve the card_id referenced on a transaction

tools.name: List Reimbursements
tools.description: List employee reimbursements with optional filtering by user, state, or date window

user_id.description: Only return reimbursements for this user

from_date.description: Only reimbursements created after this ISO 8601 date

to_date.description: Only reimbursements created before this ISO 8601 date

start.description: Pagination cursor: ID of the last entity of the previous page

historicalSummary.omitted: accounting field selections, receipts, and line item breakdowns

prompts.title: Recent spend
prompts.prompt: List my recent Ramp card transactions and summarize spend by merchant and category.

prompts.title: Pending reimbursements
prompts.prompt: Show Ramp reimbursements that are still pending and who submitted them.

prompts.title: Card inventory
prompts.prompt: List all active Ramp cards and their cardholders.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Ramp Developer API Setup

steps.title: Get a Ramp account or sandbox
steps.description: Sign up at https://ramp.com, or request Sandbox access from Ramp to build without a live account. The sandbox has the same API surface with test data: app at https://demo.ramp.com, API at https://demo-api.ramp.com.

steps.title: Create a developer app
steps.description: In the Ramp dashboard go to Company → Developer (admin access required) and click Create New App. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret.

steps.title: Enable the Client Credentials grant and scopes
steps.description: In the app settings, under Grant types add Client Credentials, then under Scopes configure the allowed scopes: transactions:read, cards:read, users:read, reimbursements:read.

steps.title: Set environment variables
steps.description: Add RAMP_CLIENT_ID and RAMP_CLIENT_SECRET to your .env.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Transactions. Access tokens are minted automatically from https://api.ramp.com/developer/v1/token using HTTP Basic auth with your client credentials; the requested scopes are sent in the token request.

notes: Sandbox and production require separate apps — create one app in each environment. This connector targets production (api.ramp.com); for sandbox testing point a copy at demo-api.ramp.com with sandbox app credentials.
Scopes are configured on the app and requested at token time; only request the scopes you need.
List endpoints paginate with a page.next cursor — pass the last item's ID as the start parameter for the next page.
